assistedsearch-error-no-api-key: AssistedSearch is not configured. Set $wgAssistedSearchApiKey in LocalSettings.php.
assistedsearch-error-llm: An error occurred while contacting the LLM: $1
assistedsearch-privacy-notice: Queries will be logged and sent to external LLM providers.
assistedsearch-time-notice: Executing the query can take up to three minutes.
assistedsearch-error-concurrency: Too many searches are running concurrently. Please try again in a moment.
